glosses.ja: ローン; クレジット

sentences.target: Ich brauche einen Kredit für das Auto.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fyːɐ̯ das ˈaʊ̯to/

translations.de: Ich brauche einen Kredit für das Auto.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fyːɐ̯ das ˈaʊ̯to/
translations.en: I need a loan for the car.
translations.es: Necesito un préstamo para el coche.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin d’un prêt pour la voiture.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un prestito per l’auto.
translations.pt: Preciso de um empréstimo para o carro.
translations.tr: Arabayı almak için krediye ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần một khoản vay để mua xe.
translations.nl: Ik heb een lening nodig voor de auto.
translations.hi: मुझे कार के लिए लोन चाहिए।
translations.nb: Jeg trenger et lån til bilen.
translations.id: Saya butuh pinjaman untuk membeli mobil.
translations.sv: Jag behöver ett lån till bilen.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de un împrumut pentru mașină.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for et lån til bilen.
translations.ja: 車のローンが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1sg) meaning 'to need'; selects an accusative direct object ('einen Kredit').
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner modifying 'Kredit'.
Common noun (masc., sg.); head of the accusative NP; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP ('für das Auto') expressing intended purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner modifying 'Auto'.
Common noun (neut., sg.); object of the preposition 'für'.

translations.en: We are paying off the loan.
translations.yue: 我哋而家喺度還緊貸款。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang trả khoản vay.
translations.ja: ローンを返済しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1pl); part of the separable verb 'abzahlen' with particle 'ab'; takes accusative object ('den Kredit').
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner modifying 'Kredit'.
Common noun (masc., sg.); head of the accusative NP; direct object of the verb ('zahlen … ab').
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'zahlen' to form 'abzahlen' ('to pay off'); placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Er bekommt heute seinen Kredit von der Bank.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ bəˈkɔmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈzaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fɔn deːɐ̯ baŋk/

translations.de: Er bekommt heute seinen Kredit von der Bank.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ bəˈkɔmt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈzaɪ̯nən kʁeˈdiːt fɔn deːɐ̯ baŋk/
translations.en: He is getting his loan from the bank today.
translations.es: Hoy recibe su préstamo del banco.
translations.fr: Il reçoit son prêt de la banque aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi riceve il suo prestito dalla banca.
translations.zh-Hans: 他今天从银行拿到贷款。
translations.yue: 佢今日喺銀行攞到貸款。
translations.ru: Сегодня он получает кредит в банке.
translations.pt: Hoje ele recebe o empréstimo do banco.
translations.he: היום הוא מקבל את ההלוואה מהבנק.
translations.vi: Hôm nay anh ấy nhận khoản vay từ ngân hàng.
translations.ar: اليوم يحصل على قرضه من البنك.
translations.nl: Vandaag krijgt hij zijn lening van de bank.
translations.uk: Сьогодні він отримує свій кредит у банку.
translations.hu: Ma megkapja a hitelét a banktól.
translations.hi: आज उसे बैंक से अपना लोन मिल रहा है।
translations.pl: Dziś dostaje swój kredyt z banku.
translations.el: Σήμερα παίρνει το δάνειό του από την τράπεζα.
translations.nb: I dag får han lånet sitt fra banken.
translations.id: Hari ini dia menerima pinjamannya dari bank.
translations.sv: Idag får han sitt lån från banken.
translations.ro: Astăzi își primește împrumutul de la bancă.
translations.cs: Dnes dostane svůj úvěr od banky.
translations.da: I dag får han sit lån fra banken.
translations.ja: 彼は今日、銀行からローンを受け取ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3sg); takes an accusative direct object ('seinen Kredit') and a source PP ('von der Bank').
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb, marking the time of the event.
Possessive determiner, masculine accusative singular; modifies 'Kredit' and agrees in case/number/gender.
Common noun (masc., sg.); head of the accusative NP; direct object of 'bekommt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP indicating the source ('von der Bank').
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner modifying 'Bank'.
Common noun (fem., sg.); object of the preposition 'von' (source).

sentences.target: Meine Schwester fragt nach einem Kredit.

translations.de: Meine Schwester fragt nach einem Kredit.
translations.en: My sister is asking about a loan.
translations.es: Mi hermana está preguntando por un préstamo.
translations.fr: Ma sœur se renseigne sur un prêt.
translations.it: Mia sorella sta chiedendo informazioni su un prestito.
translations.ko: 내 동생이 대출에 대해 알아보고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我妹妹喺度問貸款嘅事。
translations.pt: Minha irmã está perguntando sobre um empréstimo.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim kredi hakkında bilgi alıyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi đang hỏi về khoản vay.
translations.nl: Mijn zus vraagt naar een lening.
translations.hu: A nővérem érdeklődik egy hitel iránt.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन लोन के बारे में पूछ रही है।
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου ρωτάει για ένα δάνειο.
translations.nb: Søsteren min spør om et lån.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya sedang menanyakan tentang pinjaman.
translations.sv: Min syster frågar om ett lån.
translations.ro: Sora mea întreabă despre un împrumut.
translations.cs: Moje sestra se ptá na půjčku.
translations.da: Min søster spørger om et lån.
translations.ja: 妹がローンについて聞いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies 'Schwester'.
Common noun (fem., sg.); nominative subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 3sg); takes a PP complement with 'nach' + dative to indicate what is being asked for.
Preposition governing dative; introduces PP expressing the object of the request ('nach einem Kredit').
Indefinite article, masculine dative singular; determiner modifying 'Kredit' under 'nach'.
Common noun (masc., sg.); object of the preposition 'nach'.
